teaching.concept: Bold emphasis makes one phrase stand out.
teaching.howTo: Wrap the phrase with two asterisks on each side.

candidates.title: Bold emphasis
candidates.prompt: Write one short phrase in bold Markdown.

matchChecks.feedback: Make at least one phrase bold with Markdown.

editorialChecks.review: Keep bold focused on one important phrase in this short note.

hints: Bold text has a matching marker on both sides.
Type two asterisks, the phrase, then two more asterisks.
Example: `**Good news**`
